about.title: Best Quality Solar for
about.paragraph1: At Sabal Green Solar, we understand that high electricity bills can be a burden for any middle-class family. That's why we bring you the world's best solar technology at prices that actually make sense. We don't just install panels; we build a lifelong relationship with you.
about.paragraph2: Our dedicated team works tirelessly to ensure your home or business runs on free, clean energy. We listen to your problems, understand your needs, and provide solutions that work for years to come. With us, you're not just a client—you're part of our mission for a greener India.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about solar energy

questions.question: What is Solar EPC?
questions.answer: EPC stands for Engineering, Procurement, and Construction. A Solar EPC company like Sabal Green provides end-to-end solar energy solutions, including designing the system, procuring all necessary components, and installing the entire project.

questions.question: How long does a solar installation take?
questions.answer: The timeline varies based on the project size. A residential rooftop system typically takes 2-4 days, while large industrial or utility-scale projects can take several weeks to months, including planning and approvals.

questions.question: What are the maintenance requirements for solar panels?
questions.answer: Solar panels require minimal maintenance. Regular cleaning to remove dust and debris is usually sufficient. We also provide professional O&M (Operations & Maintenance) services to ensure your system performs at peak efficiency.

questions.question: Is my roof suitable for solar panels?
questions.answer: Most roofs are suitable for solar. Our engineering team conducts a thorough site assessment to evaluate roof structural integrity, orientation, and potential shading issues before designing your custom solar solution.

questions.question: What is the typical ROI for a solar project?
questions.answer: For industrial and commercial projects, the typical return on investment (ROI) is between 3 to 5 years, depending on energy consumption patterns and local electricity tariffs. After that, the electricity generated is essentially free for the remaining 20+ years of the system's life.

questions.question: What is the average lifespan of a solar panel system, and does it require heavy maintenance?

answer.intro: Solar panels are built to withstand harsh Indian weather conditions—such as extreme summer heat, monsoon rains, and heavy winds—and have a lifespan of 25 to 30 years. Most reputable manufacturers provide a 25-year performance warranty, guaranteeing that the panels will still operate at over 80% efficiency even after two and a half decades.
answer.maintenance: The system operates on very low maintenance because it has no moving parts. The only recurring requirements are:

cleaning.title: Cleaning:
cleaning.description: Wipe or hose down the panels with water once every two weeks to remove dust, bird droppings, or pollution that can block sunlight.

inverter.title: Inverter Replacement:
inverter.description: The solar inverter, which converts the electricity for home use, generally has a lifespan of 10 to 12 years and may need to be replaced or serviced once during the system's entire lifecycle.

questions.question: How much money can I save on electricity bills, and what is the return on investment (ROI) period?

answer.intro: A solar panel system reduces your grid electricity consumption by 60% to 100%, depending on your usage and system size. It generates electricity at an effective cost of roughly ₹2.50 per unit, compared to average Indian commercial/residential grid tariffs that range between ₹7 and ₹12 per unit.

monthlySavings.title: Monthly Savings:
monthlySavings.description: A standard 3 kW system generates roughly 360 to 450 units of electricity per month, saving a household approximately ₹3,000 to ₹4,500 every month on their electricity bill.

paybackPeriod.title: Payback Period (ROI):
paybackPeriod.description: For residential installations utilizing the central subsidy, the initial investment is completely recovered in 3 to 4 years. For small commercial businesses, the payback period is 3.5 to 5 years due to higher commercial grid tariffs and tax-saving benefits like accelerated depreciation.

longTermProfits.title: Long-Term Profits:
longTermProfits.description: After the payback period, the electricity generated by the system for the remaining 20+ years of its life is essentially free.
